data.title: AirJoule Technologies prices $20M public offering of 6,153,847 shares of Class A common stock at $3.25 per share.
data.description: In Ronan, Montana on January 14, 2026, AirJoule Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: AIRJ) revealed the details of its latest financial move by announcing the pricing of a public offering. The offering consists of 6,153,847 shares of its Class A common stock, with a par value of $0.0001 per share, priced at $3.25 per share. This offering is being conducted under an effective shelf registration statement on Form S-3 (File No. 333-291527) previously submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

data.title: Conagra Brands report: Frozen food industry to reach $93.5B by 2026, driven by protein meals, restaurant-inspired dishes, family-style options, and all-day breakfast.
data.description: A recent report based on data analysis identifies four main trends influencing the U.S. frozen food market in 2026. These include protein-rich meals, restaurant-style popular dishes, family-sized options, and all-day breakfast items. These trends are significantly contributing to the growth of the market.

data.title: Keenova to demonstrate live Dupuytren's Contracture treatment at AAHS, first time for both. Procedure spans two days, involves injection and finger extension.
data.description: The inaugural live procedure was successfully performed at AAHS, marking a significant milestone for both the institution and Keenova. The treatment unfolded across two days during the annual meeting, with the injection administered on Wednesday and the finger extension conducted on Friday. A notable audience of hand specialists had the opportunity to witness the procedure firsthand, along with the patient's journey.

data.title: EmpiRx Health launches medication optimization model to improve patient health outcomes and reduce costs. (Total words: 18)
data.description: Utilizing the cutting-edge technologies and expertise of EmpiRx Health's Frontline Pharmacists and AI-driven systems, "MO" is revolutionizing patient care by optimizing drug combinations to enhance health outcomes while reducing expenses. Based in Montvale, New Jersey, this initiative showcases the commitment of EmpiRx Health, a prominent pharmacy benefits management (PBM) company, towards improving member health. The efforts are yielding significant results as of January 14, 2026.

data.title: CleanSpark acquires 447 acres near Houston for AI/HPC development, with a long-term transmission facilities extension.
data.description: Today, CleanSpark, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSK) revealed its plans to acquire a significant plot of land in Brazoria County, Texas, spanning approximately 447 acres. Additionally, the Company has finalized a long-term agreement for extending transmission facilities.

data.title: LSV Top Industry Leaders Award 2025 winners revealed by Life Sciences Voice, recognizing executives shaping global life sciences.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in New York, notable executives influencing the global life sciences sector were acknowledged at the esteemed yearly awards ceremony. Life Sciences Voice (LSV), a prominent platform for industry leaders, revealed the winners of the LSV Top Industry accolades. This recognition celebrates outstanding individuals shaping the future of the life sciences industry worldwide.

data.title: Monro, Inc. (Nasdaq: MNRO) to announce Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings on Jan 28, 2026 with a conference call at 8:30am ET.
data.description: A leading provider of automotive undercar repair and tire services, Monro, Inc. (Nasdaq: MNRO), based in Fairport, N.Y., is set to announce its third quarter fiscal 2026 earnings on January 28, 2026. Interested parties can join the conference call and audio webcast on the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. To participate, dial 1-833-470-1428 and use the access code 539351. A replay of the call will be accessible around two hours after the recording.

data.title: DOGE price targets $0.16-$0.175 in Jan 2026. Short-term: $0.16. Bullish breakout at $0.16, support at $0.14. #CryptoPrediction
data.description: Predictions for the DOGE price in the short term indicate a target of $0.16 within a week. Over the next month, the forecast ranges from $0.16 to $0.175. The bullish breakout level is at $0.16, while the critical support level stands at $0.14. These projections suggest potential fluctuations in the value of the cryptocurrency in the upcoming period.

data.title: HTX Ventures named "Best Web3 VC of the Year" at 12th Hong Kong Listed Cos Awards empowering Web3 financial ecosystem.
data.description: A key industry event took place in Hong Kong on January 9, 2026, where the 2025 Hong Kong Wealth Management Summit and the 12th Hong Kong Listed Companies Awards Ceremony were held. Alec from HTX Ventures participated as a prominent speaker, providing valuable insights into the changing dynamics within Hong Kong's wealth management sector. This event drew significant attention and participation from industry experts and leaders, reflecting the importance of the topic.

data.title: European crypto exchange Bitpanda plans a $5B IPO in 2026, with Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, and Deutsche Bank on board.
data.description: Bitpanda has announced its collaboration with prestigious financial institutions including Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, and Deutsche Bank for its upcoming initial public offering on the Frankfurt stock exchange.

Average global temperatures are now around 1.4C higher than during the pre-industrial era, new data shows. If the trend continues, the 1.5C limit set out in the Paris Agreement will be breached before the end of this decade.

data.title: SOL expected to hit $160-180 by Jan 2026. Short-term target $152-155, breakout at $152.37, support at $13.
data.description: Summary of SOL Price Prediction: In the short term, the target price for SOL is estimated to be between $152 and $155 in the span of one week. Looking ahead to the medium term, forecasts suggest SOL could reach within the range of $160 to $180 over the course of one month. The bullish breakout level to watch for is set at $152.37. Additionally, it is crucial to monitor the critical support level at $130 to gauge potential market movements.

data.title: AvAir appoints Tyler Botthof as COO, effective Jan 1. A global leader in aviation solutions and services.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Chandler, Arizona, AvAir, a prominent company in aviation inventory solutions and aftermarket services, revealed the appointment of Tyler Botthof as the chief operating officer starting from January 1. Botthof's extensive expertise in the field and practical involvement in sales have led to his promotion.

data.title: Banking group reports Q4 earnings.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease is significant compared to the previous month's rate of 4.4%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs in various sectors such as healthcare, technology, and construction. The surge in hiring has been attributed to increased consumer spending and optimism in the business sector. The strong job market has also resulted in wage growth, with average hourly earnings rising by 3.1% in the past year. Overall, these numbers reflect a healthy and thriving economy with positive prospects for continued growth and prosperity.
